checklist.name: Bundle identifier and target relationship
checklist.description: Explains that the App Clip is a separate target, is embedded in the full app archive, and has a bundle identifier prefixed by the full app bundle identifier.

checklist.name: Raw entitlement keys
checklist.description: Names the App Clip on-demand install entitlement `com.apple.developer.on-demand-install-capable`, App Clip parent app entitlement `com.apple.developer.parent-application-identifiers`, and full app associated App Clip entitlement `com.apple.developer.associated-appclip-app-identifiers`.

checklist.name: Associated domains and AASA
checklist.description: Requires `appclips:` associated domains on both full app and App Clip targets plus a website AASA file for custom URL invocations and advanced experiences.

checklist.name: Experience configuration
checklist.description: Distinguishes the required default App Clip experience from optional advanced experiences needed for per-location routing, Maps, and production App Clip Codes, while allowing the short demo link for demo App Clip Codes.

checklist.name: SwiftUI and UIKit invocation routing
checklist.description: Uses SwiftUI `.onContinueUserActivity(NSUserActivityTypeBrowsingWeb)` and correctly distinguishes UIKit cold launch via `scene(_:willConnectTo:options:)` connection options from activity handling in `scene(_:continue:)`, without treating `scene(_:willContinueUserActivityWithType:)` as the URL handler.

checklist.name: Full app takeover
checklist.description: States that after installation the full app replaces the App Clip for future invocations and therefore must handle every App Clip invocation URL.
